title: [MTR/ANTE]UK Signals
description: UK&MTR East Rail signals based on JavaScript
body:
A MTR pack that adds workable UK railway signals.

### Current Content:

Classic UK signal
LED UK signal

LED route indicator

Position light shunting signal (APL/GPL)

Theatre route indicator (includes banner repeater)

Miniature alphanumeric route indicator (includes banner repeater, off dispatch signal, KCR 
variant repeater)

Flashing red light for engineering work



### Requirement:

MTR 3.1.12~3.2.2 (**does not support 4.0.0**)

[ANTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-ante) 1.0.1+
